childhood.familyBackground: Born as the second daughter of Lee Yang-gu, founder of Dongyang Group (predecessor of Orion Group). Married Dam Cheol-gon, who later became chairman of Orion Group.
childhood.education: Graduated from Ewha Womans University with a degree in Sociology.
childhood.earlyLife: Born into the founding family of Dongyang Group, Lee Hwa-kyung chose to start her career from the bottom rather than taking a management position directly. She entered Dongyang Confectionery's purchasing department as an ordinary employee in 1975.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 동양그룹(오리온그룹의 전신) 창업주 이양구의 차녀로 태어남. 이후 오리온그룹 회장이 된 담철곤과 결혼.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 동양그룹 창업가에서 태어났으나, 경영직을 바로 맡지 않고 1975년 동양제과 구매부에 '평사원'으로 입사하며 밑바닥부터 시작.

careerTimeline.event: Joined Dongyang Confectionery (now Orion) as an ordinary employee in the purchasing department
As marketing managing director, led the iconic Choco Pie 'Jeong (affection) Series' advertising campaign that became a cultural phenomenon
careerTimeline.eventKo: 마케팅 담당 상무로서 문화 현상이 된 초코파이 '정(情) 시리즈' 광고 캠페인을 진두지휘

careerTimeline.event: Selected as a Future World Leader by the Swiss Economic Forum
Promoted to President of Orion after 26 years at the company
Appointed as Head of Orion Group's food service and entertainment division, overseeing Rise On restaurants, OnMedia cable, and Megabox cinemas
careerTimeline.eventKo: 오리온그룹 외식·엔터테인먼트 부문 총괄사장으로 임명, 롸이즈온 외식, 온미디어 케이블, 메가박스 시네마 관장

careerTimeline.event: Stepped down from registered director position and withdrew from active management of Orion Group
careerTimeline.eventKo: 등기이사에서 물러나며 오리온그룹 경영 일선에서 한발 뒤로 물러남

personalTraits.knownFor: Daughter of Dongyang Group founder and wife of Orion Group chairman Dam Cheol-gon. Rose from ordinary employee to vice chairman over a 38-year career at Orion. Mastermind behind the iconic Choco Pie 'Jeong (affection)' advertising series that turned Choco Pie into a cultural symbol beyond just a snack. Called 'Midas Touch' for her track record of business successes. Oversaw Orion's diversification into entertainment (Megabox cinemas), cable TV (OnMedia), and food service.
personalTraits.controversies: Withdrew from active management after 2013, transitioning Orion to a professional management system. Her departure was accompanied by some media scrutiny regarding changes in her public profile.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 동양그룹 창업주의 딸이자 오리온그룹 담철곤 회장의 부인. 평사원에서 부회장까지 38년간의 오리온 커리어. 초코파이를 단순한 과자를 넘어 문화적 상징으로 만든 상징적인 '정(情)' 광고 시리즈의 기획자. 사업 성공 실적으로 '미다스의 손'이라 불림. 오리온의 엔터테인먼트(메가박스 시네마), 케이블TV(온미디어), 외식 사업 다각화를 주도.
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 2013년 이후 경영 일선에서 물러나며 오리온을 전문경영인 체제로 전환. 그녀의 퇴진은 공개 프로필의 변화에 대한 일부 언론의 주목을 받음.

sajuConnection.note: This field will be written by us. Leave null.
